Keyword_Stealth.name: Stealth
Keyword_Stealth.description: Stealthed characters cannot be directly targeted by enemies. Using an attack or taking damage will instantly remove Stealth.

Keyword_Berserk.name: Berserking
Keyword_Berserk.description: Berserking grants [25|%x|] increased damage and [15|%+|] increased Movement Speed. This effect lasts up to 5 seconds.

Keyword_Immune.name: Immune
Keyword_Immune.description: Immune characters cannot be damaged and are Unstoppable with all Control Impairing Effects removed and prevented.

Keyword_Fortify.name: Fortify
Keyword_Fortify.description: Fortify is an additional reservoir of Life that is drained to heal you over time.

Keyword_Barrier.name: Barrier
Keyword_Barrier.description: Barriers absorb damage from all sources up to a specified amount.

Keyword_Daze.name: Daze
Keyword_Daze.description: Dazed enemies cannot attack or use Skills but are still able to move.

Keyword_Ignited.name: Ignited
Keyword_Ignited.description: Ignited enemies take [200|%x|]  extra Burning damage per source of Burning.

Keyword_Volatility.name: Volatility
Keyword_Volatility.description: Volatility randomly empowers Hellfire Skills when you attack with them. Empowered skills deal 50% increased damage on their next cast.
